literature_standard: Only complete checklists support inferred non-detections
SED supplies sampling events absent from species-filtered EBD; wholly SED-only events can be structural unknowns when their checklist identity is unavailable
reported_stage2_state: Every EBD key maps to SED; the repair excludes wholly SED-only structural-unknown events from the primary frame
required_action: Verify identical release and taxonomy and retain the structural-unknown exclusion
verification_test: Release identifiers and hashes agree; every retained primary event has a verified EBD-to-SED identity

literature_standard: X means detected but not numerically counted
reported_stage2_state: X is separate and contributes to detection only
verification_test: X maps to detection=1 and numeric_count=missing

literature_standard: Encounter and positive count are distinct estimands
reported_stage2_state: Hurdle lognormal primary; truncated NB2 parallel
verification_test: Output labels name eligible checklists and conditional count

literature_standard: One group identifier is one birding event
reported_stage2_state: The repair constructs one composite analysis event per shared group and excludes effort-disagreement groups from the primary frame
required_action: Approved; retain the composite-event and disagreement rules
verification_test: Each group_identifier yields one checklist-species row and disagreement groups are absent from primary

literature_standard: Only eligible complete lists generate zeros; incomplete lists and structural-unknown SED-only events do not
reported_stage2_state: The repair zero-fills eligible complete events after event construction and excludes wholly SED-only structural unknowns from primary
required_action: Approved; retain the zero provenance and structural-unknown rules
verification_test: Eligible complete omission becomes zero; incomplete and wholly SED-only structural-unknown events never do

literature_standard: Accepted/approved records are the conventional analysis set
verification_test: Every retained EBD row satisfies the approved-record rule

literature_standard: Cornell worked guide uses <=6 h <=10 km <=10 observers for 3 km weekly use and calls for stricter distance at finer scales
reported_stage2_state: The repair promotes 5-300 minutes <=5 km and 1-10 observers to candidate primary; the wider set is sensitivity only
required_action: Approved; retain the standardized primary effort set
verification_test: Metadata-only support counts by effort bins

literature_standard: Stationary distance is set to zero before speed/distance handling
Public point is not route; finer spatial inference needs stricter travel limits
reported_stage2_state: The repaired candidate primary is <=5 km while local herring exposure uses 2 km
required_action: Approved <=5 km primary with <=2 km high-precision sensitivity
verification_test: Compare exposure classification/support across travel-distance strata without bird fields

literature_standard: Repeated lists from observers/hotspots are dependent
reported_stage2_state: The repair carries one composite event per shared group and retains observer/site dependence for modeled or blocked handling
required_action: Approved; implement and verify the dependence structure
verification_test: Report repeats and effective replication by observer/site and verify no shared group is duplicated

literature_standard: Nearby and same-event records should not cross train/test split
reported_stage2_state: Held-out performance registered; blocking unit not stated
required_action: Authorized event-complex or source-point spatial-time blocking; implement during Stage 3 Phase 3
verification_test: No event complex or source-point spatial-time block occurs in both train and test

literature_standard: Encounter is reporting on an eligible checklist; count is a relative index; occupancy needs repeat visits and closure
reported_stage2_state: Response states separated; public claim wording not locked
required_action: Approved prose definitions; enforce them in results templates
verification_test: Results template excludes absence absolute abundance and unjustified occupancy language

literature_standard: Checklist submission locations and timing are non-random
verification_test: Checklist and unique-observer counts by region event-time distance and protocol

literature_standard: Completeness and zero-fill operate at species level under a versioned taxonomy
reported_stage2_state: 58 taxa reconciled to exact species under v2025
verification_test: Taxonomy version and roll-up disposition are recorded for every taxon

literature_standard: Stationary/traveling and area protocols have different support
verification_test: No complete-area row enters stationary/traveling primary stream
